texto: No matter how loud they shout injustice. Don't surrender to their absurdity.
explicacao: Citação de Sarvesh Jain sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “No matter how loud they shout injustice. Don't surrender to their absurdity.” articula motivacao, motivational-quotes, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.

texto: It's emotions. Sometimes you feel, sometimes you don't. You can't force yourself into feeling something, can you?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Sarvesh Jain que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “It's emotions. Sometimes you feel, sometimes you don't. You can't force yourself into feeling som…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, emotions, sometimes, com foco em reflexao.
